question: The chart shows market share by company. Which statement is correct according to the chart data?

options.A: Company C has the largest market share among all companies.
options.B: Company A has the smallest market share.
options.C: Company D has the largest market share among all companies.
options.D: Company A and Company B together make up less than 10% of the market.

explanation: Labels show Company C has the highest percentage. The pie uses visual_size for slice angles, so Company D's slice can appear larger, misleading viewers.
